title: Wife Wanted

actors: Kay Francis, Paul Cavanagh, Robert Shayne
plot: Career-slipping movie star Carole Raymond (Kay Francis) buys in as a real estate partner of Jeff Caldwell (Paul Cavanagh). As it happens, through his secretary Nola Reed (Veda Ann Borg), Caldwell runs a matrimonial bureau, and aid...
